name: Pocket Alexandria
tagline: AI-powered digital library — 1,300+ public domain texts with automated discovery, download, and organization pipelines
description: Personal digital library system that automatically discovers, downloads, and organizes public domain books. 1,300+ texts collected via automated pipelines. DeepSeek AI fallback for resilient data fetching when primary sources fail. Built because good books shouldn't be hard to find.
content_angles: 1,300+ public domain texts organized with automated pipelines
AI-powered book discovery — finds what you didn't know you were looking for
DeepSeek fallback strategy: if one AI fails, another picks up
